allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **p.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; keys=[k for k in deps if ''three'' in k.lower\(\) or ''r3f'' in k.lower\(\) or ''fiber'' in k.lower\(\) or ''drei'' in k.lower\(\) or ''post'' in k.lower\(\) or ''tensorflow'' in k.lower\(\) or ''tfjs'' in k.lower\(\) or ''transformers'' in k.lower\(\)]; [print\(k,deps[k]\) for k in sorted\(keys\)]")
